arts.ttl: Bournemouth look for a fourth consecutive win against struggling West Ham
arts.sum: AFC Bournemouth host West Ham at the Vitality Stadium as they look to extend a three-game win streak in the Premier League.

arts.ttl: Bournemouth v West Ham: Premier League – live
arts.sum: Updates from the 8pm GMT kick-off at the Vitality Stadium Get in touch! You can email Michael here Speaking of left-backs, this interview with Milos Kerkez is well worth your time. Both West Ham left backs, Emerson and Cresswell, are out of the squad. Emerson is suspended, having picked up his fifth yellow card of the season during last Monday’s 2-1 win over Wolves. Wan Bissaka will swap flanks tonight from right back, with Coufal coming to play in his normal position. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: Coufal and Paquetá return at AFC Bournemouth
arts.sum: On the bench will be goalkeeper Alphonse Areola, young defenders Ollie Scarles and Kaelan Casey, midfielders Andy Irving, Lewis Orford and Luis Guilherme, winger Summerville and strikers Danny Ings and Niclas Füllkrug. Subs: Areola (GK), Scarles, Casey, Orford, Irving, Luis Guilherme, Summerville, Ings, Füllkrug

arts.ttl: Daniel Kretinsky's West Ham ties and chances of full takeover after billionaire's Royal Mail deal
arts.sum: Czech billionaire Daniel Kretinsky has shares in West Ham United, and we have explored the chances of him fully taking over the Premier League club after he finally got approval to buy the Royal Mail

arts.ttl: Rohl, Potter, Corberan or Moyes? contenders to replace Russell Martin at Saints
arts.sum: The Sport Republic-owned club parted company with their play-off winning coach following Sunday’s 5-0 home humbling at the hands of Tottenham.

arts.ttl: Bournemouth vs West Ham – Match preview and team news
arts.sum: Bournemouth welcome West Ham to the Vitality Stadium in the Premier League on Monday night. Andoni Iraola’s team are targeting a fourth consecutive Premier League win, against a West Ham side whose season has struggled to get going under Julen Lopetegui. However, a win over Wolves last time out has lifted confidence at the London […] The post Bournemouth vs West Ham – Match preview and team news first appeared on The Football Faithful.
